publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-02-03 18:23:31 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Delta Gamma, Chi chapter records
did.physdesc: Correspondence, financial documents, photographs, printed materials
did.abstract: Records of the Chi chapter at Cornell of Delta Gamma.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Chi chapter of Delta Gamma was founded in 1885 at Cornell University.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records of the Chi chapter at Cornell of Delta Gamma. Collection contains information regarding history, operations and activities including the Delta Gamma Property Association, Panhellenic items, the Anchora publication, philanthropy, financial items, and roster of members. Also information and photographs pertaining to various conventions and the 1985 centennial and 2010 anniversary celebrations. Includes the original charter given to the national for the Chi chapter.

p.ref: Series I. Delta Gamma General Documents
Series II. Building and Construction Papers
Series IV. The Anchora of Delta Gamma

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Delta Gamma, Chi chapter records, #37-4-4071. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. Delta Gamma General Documents
Delta Gamma Fraternity Charter

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Given to Rachel Meyers, Lucy Alvord, Esther M. Sanford, Fredrika Meloy, and Kate Selmser. Signed by Emma Goddard, Emma Drinker, Regina Lindeman, and Belle Brown, Madison Wisconsin.

did.unittitle: Delta Gamma Chi Chapter, Ithaca alumnae letters
Composite photograph

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photo includes: Chedie Connor Brown, Jessie Capron Phisterer, Margaret Coppens Kuntz, Bertha Stoneman, Lucy Crissey Robertson, Grace Doubleday Harris, Nellie Reed Burnett, Carrie Myers Northup, Emily Perry Howland, Minnie Hannah Chamberlain, Anna Bronson Root, Gertrude Nelson Buck, Leona Bowman, Nellie Hoag, Lillian Hoag, Anna Perry Durand, Elva Price Burnett, Agnes Avery Pierce, Rose Mills Powers, Elizabeth Avery, Harriet Bliss Stocking, Lillian Coleman, and Blance Moore Averill

did.unittitle: Composite photographs
Photographs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photos of members from 1916-1917, 1946 and 1948

Series IV. The Anchora of Delta Gamma

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Not a complete run, there are missing bound and loose issues.
